data.current_description: Returns all available cities with webcam coverage.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all cities with webcam coverage
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a complete list of all cities that have webcam coverage in the Windy Webcams database. Returns city metadata including geographic identifiers and location information. Use this operation to populate city selection filters or discover available locations for webcam searches. Supports optional filtering via query parameters.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about return structure, use cases, and parameter details. Enhanced version explains the operation's purpose for AI agents, clarifies what data is returned, provides context for when to use it, and mentions parameter support for better discoverability.

message: Operation 'exportAllWebcams' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary lacks specificity about the export format and scope. Description is incomplete regarding output format, data contents, and authentication requirements. Enhanced version clarifies the JSON export format, specifies what data is included, explains the use case for bulk export, and explicitly states the professional tier requirement for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns a full export of all webcam data. Exclusive to the professional API tier.
data.description_suggestion: Exports the complete Windy Webcams database as a JSON file containing all webcam records with full metadata. Includes webcam locations, images, player embeds, and associated geographic data. This operation is exclusive to the professional API tier and returns bulk data optimized for offline use or system integration. Requires professional tier authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about the export format and scope. Description is incomplete regarding output format, data contents, and authentication requirements. Enhanced version clarifies the JSON export format, specifies what data is included, explains the use case for bulk export, and explicitly states the professional tier requirement for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Returns a paginated list of webcams with optional filtering by location, category, country, region, city, and other criteria.
data.summary_suggestion: Search and filter webcams by location and category
data.description_suggestion: Returns a paginated list of webcams with optional filtering by location, category, country, region, city, and other criteria. Supports sorting and limiting results. Each webcam object includes location coordinates, images, player embed URLs, and metadata. Use this operation to discover webcams matching specific geographic or categorical requirements.

data.current_description: Returns detailed information about a specific webcam by its ID.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve detailed webcam information by ID
data.description_suggestion: Returns comprehensive information about a specific webcam identified by its ID. Includes location coordinates, live image URLs, player embed code, categories, and metadata. Use this operation when you need full details about a particular webcam for display or integration purposes.

message: Operation 'getMapClusters' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary lacks clarity about the clustering purpose. Description doesn't explain how to use the zoom/bounding box parameters or what the response structure contains. Enhanced summary to clarify the map-specific purpose. Expanded description to explain the clustering mechanism and expected inputs/outputs for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns a list of webcams optimized for displaying on a map, clustered by zoom level and bounding box.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve clustered webcams for map display
data.description_suggestion: Returns webcams optimized for map visualization, clustered by zoom level and geographic bounding box. Clustering reduces visual clutter at lower zoom levels by grouping nearby webcams. Provide zoom level and bounding box coordinates to retrieve the appropriate cluster level. Returns webcam locations and cluster metadata for rendering on interactive maps.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks clarity about the clustering purpose. Description doesn't explain how to use the zoom/bounding box parameters or what the response structure contains. Enhanced summary to clarify the map-specific purpose. Expanded description to explain the clustering mechanism and expected inputs/outputs for better AI agent understanding.
